control_statement: Sensitive Financial Information must be classified as per a Financial Institution’s highest classification tier.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Introduction As data is a cornerstone of financial operations, the secure handling and protection of sensitive information is a critical activity financial institutions must undertake.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Organizational Governance 4.1 All data collected, stored, or processed by a Financial Institution or through a Third Party on behalf of a Financial Institution must be handled in accordance with QCB Law, this regulation, the Qatar Data Privacy Protection Law and any other relevant laws and regulations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 4.2 A Financial Institution must establish a dedicated data governance business unit, or assign it to an existing function.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 4.3 A Financial Institution may establish a data governance committee with representation from senior management, risk, information technology, information security, legal and compliance as well as other relevant functions.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Such a committee may engage in tasks including: 4.3.1 Reviewing data privacy and protection risks.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 4.4 A Financial Institution must appoint a Data Privacy Officer (DPO) who possesses the necessary knowledge and experience in data privacy, notifying QCB of the appointed DPO and submit the required Fit and Proper Form as per QCB Licensing Regulations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 1 A Financial Institution may appoint a DPO to an existing role, ensuring that it is independent of conflicts of interests and operate independently without being directed in the performance of their tasks.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 2 A Financial Institution must ensure that the DPO is not involved within Financial Institution operations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 3 A Foreign Financial Institution may appoint a DPO based within their headquarters, ensuring that a Qatar-based representative is assigned responsibility to liaise and facilitate in order to ensure data privacy and protection requirements are met consistently.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 4.5 A Financial Institution must ensure its DPO’s roles and responsibilities include: 4.5.1 Assessing the Financial Institution’s compliance to data privacy and protection requirements as per relevant laws and regulations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 4.6 A Financial Institution must ensure its DPO reports directly to the CEO or the most senior management position, who must ensure data privacy and protection risks are communicated to the board.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 4.7 A Financial Institution must provide the required training and awareness to promote skill development for its employees and relevant stakeholders to ensure that they regularly update their knowledge of data privacy and management, data classification, data handling, data cataloguing, data stewardship, data backup up, disaster recovery, etc.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Framework, policies and procedures 5.1 A Financial Institution must establish an internal data governance policy that applies to all their business processes and operational procedures to ensure proper handling in the collection, class ification, security, integrity, storage, retention, access, use, transfer and destruction of data throughout its lifecycle.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.2 A Financial Institution must ensure that its data governance policy includes: 5.2.1 Identification of all relevant laws and regulations the Financial Institution must adhere to.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.3 A Financial Institution must assess requirements of leading data governance standards, while ensuring they maintain compliance with the requirements of this regulation.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.4 A Financial Institution must publish its External Privacy Policy statement on externally hosted channels, to the extent necessary, informing customers of their rights and how their data will be collected, accessed, processed, shared and retained.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.5 A Financial Institution must publish its Internal Privacy Policy in an easily-accessible and context-specific manner, to the extent necessary for all staff involved.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Handling and Protection Regulation 7 5.6 A Financial Institution must develop data mapping procedures to define data assets and their paths through the entities’ processes.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.7 A Financial Institution must establish consent procedures for customer data processing that aligns with processes and technologies utilized within the Financial Institution.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.8 A Financial Institution must define specific destruction guidelines for data and hardware that has reached the end of its retention period.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.9 A Financial Institution must align its business continuity plans, disaster recovery plans and backup strategy with the requirements of this regulation and their data governance frameworks, policies, and procedu res.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.10 A Financial Institution must ensure it identifies risks associated with data privacy and the mitigating controls.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 5.11 A Financial Institution must maintain a detailed inventory of all assets within its processing environment, including Third Party assets, mapped to its critical processes and services.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Classification Framework 6.1 A Financial Institution must develop and maintain a data classification policy based on industry leading practices, which includes Financial Institution-wide responsibilities for classifying data.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 6.2 A Financial Institution must develop and maintain a data handling guideline that details how to handle data of different classifications.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: A Financial Institution may utilize the National Cyber Security Agency’s National Data Classification Policy.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 6.3 A Financial Institution must define the following for each classification level: classification definition, data examples, storage requirements, labelling requirements, cybersecurity controls, physical access controls, logical access controls, data masking requirements, transmission requirements and destruction mechanism.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 1 A Financial Institution must conduct annual reviews of their ROPA, or conduct reviews that are triggered by changes to the Financial Institution.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: These changes may include but are not limited to: organizational restructure, new regulatory requirements, changes to the da ta processing environment, etc.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 2 A Financial Institution may implement tools that automate updates to their ROPA.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 3 A Financial Institution must document and justify any data excluded from the ROPA and detail the associated risks.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 6.5 A Financial Institution must conduct Data Mapping to outline all data assets and their flow across organizational processes.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Handling and Protection Regulation 8 6.5.1 A Financial Institution must review data maps annually, to ensure current and accurate representation of data flows, or conduct reviews that are triggered by c hanges to the Financial Institution.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: These changes may include but are not limited to: organizational restructure, new regulatory requirements, changes to the data processing environment, etc.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 2 A Financial Institution must complete Data Mapping exercises for their environments.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 3 A Financial Institution must document and justify any data or processes excluded from the data map and detail the associated risks.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Handling 7.1 A Financial Institution must identify data that is Personally Identifiable Information (PII), Sensitive Personal Information (SPI), Sensitive Financial Information (SFI) and Technical Information, as defined in this regulation.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 7.2 A Financial Institution must classify data that is PII and Technical Data, as per the Financial Institution’s data classification framework.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 7.3 A Financial Institution must classify and manage SPI and SFI as per the highest, most strict classification available.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 7.4 A Financial Institution must process PII, SPI and SFI only when one of the following conditions (at least) is met: 7.4.1 The Financial Institution has received explicit consent from the Data Subject.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 7.5 A Financial Institution must put in place a process to remediate previously collected PII, SPI and SFI that does not adhere to requirement 7.4.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 7.6 A Financial Institution must ensure its primary environment, the main data storage and processing environment, for PII, SPI and SFI resides within the State of Qatar.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 7.7 A Financial Institution may utilize a primary storage and processing environment for PII, SPI and SFI outside the State of Qatar only after receiving explicit approval from QCB.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 7.8 A Financial Institution must adhere to Bank Secrecy requirements, especially when processing SFI as per QCB Law and any other relevant laws and regulations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 7.9 A Financial Institution must limit its data collection activities to data it requires to provide services to the customer, or to adhere to legal and regulatory requirements.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Security 8.1 A Financial Institution must develop robust data quality controls and validation processes to ensure the accuracy and reliability of processed data.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Handling and Protection Regulation 9 8.2 A Financial Institution must develop dedicated security controls for all data that is classified as PII, SPI or SFI, while applying requirements as per the Sector-Specific Security Regulation to protect it based on criticality and assumed risks.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 8.3 A Financial Institution must update its security controls for all data tha t is classified as PII, SPI or SFI, while accounting for the changing threat landscape.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 8.4 A Financial Institution may utilize tools and technologies to operationalize its data classification and management requirements, while ensuring regular testing and pat ching of the systems and that they are kept up to date.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 8.5 A Financial Institution must review its data classification on regular basis t o mitigate risks of misclassification.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 8.6 A Financial Institution must transfer its data through secure and encrypted mediums, as per leading industry standards and the Sector-Specific Security Regulation.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 8.7 A Financial Institution must use specialized, reputable and secure physical transportation methods, when transporting data on a physical medium such a documents or storage tapes.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 9.2 A Financial Institution must assess its Third Party’s compliance to relevant data protection laws and regulations, as well as any certifications or audit reports.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 9.3 A Financial Institution may only share sensitive information with Third Parties they have non-disclosure and confidentiality requirements in place with, dependent on the associated risks.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 9.4 A Financial Institution must ensure that any data breaches or data privacy breaches involving its data are promptly reported by the Third Party involved to a designated representative within the Financial Institution.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 9.5 A Financial Institution must include provisions for data protection, confidentiality, and co mpliance with regulatory requirements within its contractual agreements with Third Parties.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 9.6 A Financial Institution must collect consent from customers and employees prior to sharing their information with a Third Party, unless this is shared for legal purposes, regulatory purposes, or contract fulfilment.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 9.7 A Financial Institution must inform the customer of the impact of not granting consent to information sharing with the Third Party.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 9.8 A Financial Institution must ensure its Third Parties handle data in a manner that meets the requirements of this regulation.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 9.9 A Financial Institution must implement risk-based data protection controls for data residing in all environments and data hosted by its Third Parties.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Assessments and Reporting 10.1 A Financial Institution must document a policy mandating ongoing data handling and management assessments including those defined within this section.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 10.2 A Financial Institution must subject its primary, secondary, Disaster Recovery (DR) and backup environments to the assessments defined within this section.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 10.3 A Financial Institution must define a process for conducting Privacy Impact Assessments (PIA) for all sensitive processes, in order to test whether privacy objectives are met and to ensure that data processin g adheres to processing requirements, retention requirements and appropriate access controls.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: The process must include: 10.3.1 Defining what a sensitive process is and when a PIA is required.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 10.4 A Financial Institution must conduct a PIA in the following cases: 10.4.1 Initiating a new activity that involves a sensitive process.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 3 Observing significant changes to laws and regulations of relevant jurisdictions that may impact Data Subject privacy.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 10.5 A Financial Institution must review its PIA methodologies for accuracy and relevance and update as needed.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 10.6 A Financial Institution must establish a foreign data handling assessment that ensures data stored in, passing through or accessible from foreign jurisdictions continues to meet regulatory requirements and data protection standards.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 10.7 A Financial Institution must monitor changes in the legal and regulatory landscape of foreign jurisdictions to promptly assess and address any potential impact, on ongoing basis, reporting significant findings to QCB.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 10.8 A Financial Institution must develop a procedure that defines the mechanisms by which these assessments will be completed.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: This must include the following: 10.8.1 Assessment owner 10.8.2 Assessment stakeholders 10.8.3 Timeline and Frequency 10.8.4 Expected outcomes and recommendations 10.9 A Financial Institution must audit its data handling and management activities, and assess its compliance to data protection laws, regulations and leading industry standards as per the Financial Institution’s defined audit cycle.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Retention 11.1 A Financial Institution must ensure its retention of different categories of data considers legal, regulatory, and business requirements.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 11.2 A Financial Institution must comply to data retention requirements specified in the relevant AML / CFT laws and regulations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 11.3 A Financial Institution must retain data as per the following table: Data Minimum Retention Period SFI 10 years Personal Data, PII and SPI 10 years Technical Information 1 year All other data To be defined by the Financial Institution 11.4 A Financial Institution must retain data beyond the minimum retention periods defined within 11.3, if the extended data retention is obligated by a legal or regulatory mandate.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity Backup 12.1 A Financial Institution must establish a Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery plan, emphasizing resilient data protection and privacy safeguards.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: The plan must include: 12.1.1 Local and foreign DR and backup requirements 12.1.2 Policy and processes for DR and data backup 12.1.3 Data retention periods 12.1.4 Backup frequency 12.1.5 Data storage and destruction processes 12.1.6 Defined trigger events 12.1.7 Ongoing testing and assessments 12.2 A Financial Institution must integrate its disaster recovery plan process into the Financial Institution’s overall governance processes and risk management framework.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.3 A Financial Institution must ensure continuous availability of critical systems and processes through redundancy controls and failover processes which include but are not limited to: conducting real -time or scheduled backups of critical data, ensuring that backup frequency aligns with the criticality and volatility of the data.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.4 A Financial Institution must implement security controls including robust encryption and data security measures for DR and backups, as per the Sector-Specific Security Regulation.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.5 A Financial Institution must define and implement physical access management controls and processes to protect DR and backup data centers, network equipment rooms, storage sites, servers and workstations, in accordance with the Sector-Specific Security Regulation.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.6 A Financial Institution must regularly test its Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery plans.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Handling and Protection Regulation 12 12.7 A Financial Institution must consider any legal, reputational and operational impediments within its disaster recovery plan.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.8 A Financial Institution must assess jurisdictional, legal, regulatory, political, and environmental risks associated with foreign DR and backup locations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.9 A Financial Institution must remain responsible and accountable for its disaster recovery readiness activities.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.10 A Financial Institution must develop a disaster recovery communication plan with relevant stakeholders, including QCB, shareholders, employees, key group entities, Third Parties, customers, regulators and the media.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.11 A Financial Institution must ensure that business continuity is not disrupted by dependencies on outsourcing contracts with Third Party service providers.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 12.12 A Financial Institution must maintain its backup and DR environments as per the following table: Local Banks & Insurance Companies Branches of Foreign Banks & Insurance Companies Other Local Financial Institutions Branches of Other Foreign Financial Institutions Local DR Mandatory Qatar-Based Systems – Mandatory Other – Recommended Mandatory Qatar-Based Systems – Mandatory Other – Recommended Foreign DR Optional.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: However, the QCB reserves the right to direct any Financial Institution to maintain a foreign DR at its discretion Local backup Mandatory Mandatory Mandatory Mandatory Foreign backup Mandatory Mandatory Recommended Recommended 12.13 A Financial Institution must request approval from QCB when it utilizes foreign DR and backup environments, in alignment with section 15 below.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Privacy Protection Requirements 13.1 A Financial Institution must ensure that Personal Data, PII and SPI is: 13.1.1 Processed in compliance to the Law No.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 13.2 A Financial Institution must ensure that the systems and controls address the following: 13.2.1 Ensure the confidentiality, integrity and availability of data and information.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Handling and Protection Regulation 13 13.3 A Financial Institution must deploy systems and controls that enable it to identify, assess, monitor and manage data protection risk.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 13.4 A Financial Institution must assess privacy protection and data protection controls when processing data in a semi-autonomous or autonomous manner.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 13.5 A Financial Institution must seek approval from QCB prior to processing data and information within fully autonomous decision-making systems.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Customer Data Protection 14.1 A Financial Institution may process Data Subject information only when one of the follow ing conditions (at least) is met: 14.1.1 The Financial Institution has received explicit consent from the Data Subject.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.2 A Financial Institution must establish proper procedures to obtain consent from its customers to collect, access, process, share, and retain data, unless it is necessary for regulatory activity, legal activity or contract fulfilment.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.3 A Financial Institution must periodically review its consent procedures to ensure that consent is freely given, specific, informed and unambiguous.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.4 A Financial Institution must establish the necessary procedures to ensure that customers: 14.4.1 Obtain confirmation of whether their personal data is being processed.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: The Financial Institution shall establish a policy for data deletion that considers the following conditions: 14.4.5.1 Deletion will not impact the overall business continuity of the Financial Institution.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.5 A Financial Institution processing information associated with a minor must verify that the person giv ing consent, holds parental responsibility “legitimate interest” for the minor.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.6 A Financial Institution must define rejection use cases for requests made as per requirement (14.4), whilst maintaining the right to reject the requests.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Handling and Protection Regulation 14 14.7 A Financial Institution may define a process for expiring consent and consent renewal, if required by certain activities undertaken by the financial institution.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.8 A Financial Institution must ensure that the customer has the right to refuse and withdraw consent at any time, except where processing is necessary for legal and regulatory obligations or contract fulfilment.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.9 A Financial Institution may establish a consent management portal for customers to view and update the consent they have granted a Financial Institution.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.10 A Financial Institution must maintain a record of the consent granted including but not limited to the following: 14.10.1 Purpose of Data Processing.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 14.11 A Financial Institution must inform the customer of the impact of not granting or withdrawing consent on the provision of services to the customer.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Foreign Data Storage and Transfer Requirements 15.1 A Financial Institution must not store or transfer Personal Data, PII, SPI and SFI to a foreign jurisdiction unless it has received approval from QCB.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 15.2 A Financial Institution must conduct due diligence on jurisdictions and Third Parties that would require foreign data transfers or storage, which includes but may not be limited to: 15.2.1 A risk assessment which includes risks associated with data security and storing data in foreign jurisdictions.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 15.3 A Financial Institution must establish mechanisms to control access to data stored in the foreign jurisdiction, including procedures for granting and revoking access, monitoring user activity, and detecting unauthorized access or data breaches.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 15.4 A Financial Institution must ensure at all times that any transfer of personal data to a foreign jurisdiction maintains an adequate level of protection in accordance with the standards defined within this regulation and any other relevant laws and regulations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 15.5 A Financial Institution must identify risks associated with operational processes and systems at separate geographic locations.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 15.6 A Financial Institution must assess the legal and regulatory requirements of foreign jurisdictions where they process data that may restrict a Financial Institution’s ability to meet regulatory obligations in Qatar.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Data Breaches 16.1 A Financial Institution must report Data Breaches and Data Privacy Breaches as per QCB’s incident reporting guidelines.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 16.2 A Financial Institution must classify any Data Breach or Data Privacy Beach as an incident and adhere to incident reporting guidelines as directed by the QCB.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 16.3 A Financial Institution must report Data Breaches and Data Privacy Breaches to QCB and the authorized agencies in Qatar which includes the National Cyber Security Agency and the Ministry of Interior.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 16.4 A Financial Institution must assess the impact of the breach, upon identification.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 16.5 A Financial Institution must assess the need to report a breach to its customers.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 16.6 A Financial Institution must trigger action from relevant stakeholders, including employees and customers, to circumvent potential impact of the breach.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Exemptions 17.1 A Financial Institution seeking an exemption from any requirement within this regulation must request it from QCB.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 17.2 A Financial Institution must link its exemption request to a specific requirement in this regulation from which it is seeking a waiver.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 17.3 A Financial Institution must support its exemption request with a clear and documented business case or rationale.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 17.4 A Financial Institution must ensure that the appropriate individuals or levels of authority within the Financial Institution consistently approve the exemption.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 17.5 A Financial Institution must duly record in the Financial Institution’s exemptions register any approved exemptions and assign an expiration date – the date by which the exemption will be mitigated or resolved by the Financial Institution seeking the exemption.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 17.6 A Financial Institution must remain accountable for any risks stemming from approved exemptions.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Compliance with Secondary Regulations Along with the QCB Law and this regulation, the Financial Institution must also comply with the below mentioned secondary regulations, and their subsequent amendments, while operating in Qatar: 18.1 Sector-Specific Security Regulation.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: 18.4 Regulations or Guidelines that may be issued by QCB, including those related to emerging technology.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: The following table lists the requirements that may be considered as recommendations by certain financial institutions.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: This document is not official and the official version of the law is the one published in the Official Gazette number 15 of year 2016 that is available on almeezan.qa Chapter One Definitions and General Provisions Article (1) For the implementation of the provisions hereof, the following terms and words shall have such meanings assigned to the same, unless otherwise required by context: Ministry: Ministry of Transport and Communications.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).

control_statement: Controller: a natural or legal person who, whether acting individually or jointly with others, determines how Personal Data may be processed and determines the purpose(s) of any suc h processing Personal Data Processing.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: Article (2) Provisions hereof shall apply to Personal Data when it is electronically processed, or obtained, gathered or extracted in preparation in any other way for electronic processing, or w hen processed via a combination of electronic and traditional processing.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: Provisions hereof shall not apply to Personal Data processed by individuals within a private or a family scope, or to any Personal Data processed for the purpose of obtaining official statistical data as per provisions of the referred to law No (2) of 2011.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: This document is not official and the official version of the law is the one published in the Official Gazette number 15 of year 2016 that is available on almeezan.qa Chapter Two Rights of Individuals Article (3) Each Individual has the right to the protection of the Personal Data thereof that shall be processed only within the framework of transparency, honesty, and respect of human dignity, and acceptable practices according to provisions hereof.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: Article (4) The Controller shall process Personal Data only after obtaining the consent of the Individual, unless data processing is necessar y to achieve a Lawful Purpose for the Controller or the other recipient of such data.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: A request so made shall be accompanied with proof of the accuracy of such request.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: Obtain a copy of the Personal Data thereof after paying an amount that shall not exceed the service charge.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: Article (7) The controls and procedures, related to individuals’ exercise of rights provided for in the two preceding Articles , shall be specified by a decision of the Minister.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: This document is not official and the official version of the law is the one published in the Official Gazette number 15 of year 2016 that is available on almeezan.qa Chapter Three Liabilities of Controller and Processor Article (8) The Controller shall abide by the following: 1.
implementation_task: Define approach and implement control (tech + ops).
source_doc_title: Law No. (13) of 2016  on Protecting Personal Data Privacy - English (1).pdf

control_statement: The privacy protecting policies developed by the Competent Department, and a decision thereon shall be issued by the Minister.

control_statement: Article (10) The Controller shall verify that Personal Data that he collects, or being collected for the benefit thereof, is relevant to Lawful Purposes and adequate for achieving the same.

control_statement: Article (13) Each of the Controller and the Processor shall take the precautions necessary to protect Personal Data against loss, damage, change, disclosure, access thereto, or the inadvertent or illegal use thereof.

control_statement: Such precautions shall be commensurate with the nature and the importance of the Personal Data intended to be protected.

control_statement: The Processor shall forthwith notify the Controller of the existence of any breach of the precautions referred to, or where any risk arises threatening Personal Data in any way.

control_statement: Article (14) The Controller shall inform the Individual and Competent Department of the occurrence of any breach of the precautions provided for in the preceding Article, and if such breach may cause serious damage to Personal Data or individual privacy.

control_statement: Chapter Four Personal Data with Special Nature Article (16) The Personal data, related to ethnic origin, children, health, physical or psychological condition, religious creeds, marital relations, and criminal offenses, shall be regarded as Personal data with special nature.

control_statement: Personal Data of a special nature may only be processed after obtaining the permission from the Competent Department, as per the measures and controls determined by a decision issued by the Minister.

control_statement: Chapter Six Electronic Communication for the Purpose of Direct Marketing Article (22) The transmission of any Electronic Communication to an Individual, for the purpose of Direct Marketing, shall be forbidden, except after obtaining the prior consent thereof.

control_statement: In addition, it shall include a valid address for easy access thereto and through which an Individual can send a request to the originator to stop such communications or revoke the consent on the sending thereof.

control_statement: This document is not official and the official version of the law is the one published in the Official Gazette number 15 of year 2016 that is available on almeezan.qa Chapter Eight Final Provisions Article (26) An Individual may file a complaint to the Competent Department in case of violating provisions hereof and the issued decisions in the implementation thereof.

control_statement: The Competent Department may, after investigating received complaints and proving the seriousness thereof, issue a reasoned decision binding the Controller or Processor, as the case may be, to rectify such breach within a period it specifies.

control_statement: The Controller or Processor may raise a grievance against such decision to the Minister, within sixty days from the notification date thereof.
